acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the DIA-mode (data‐independent‐acquisition).
alkylation reagent: samples were then alkylated with 200 mM iodoacetamide (30 min at room temperature, dark)
alkylation concentration: samples were then alkylated with 200 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: with a mass spectrometry grade Lys‐C and Trypsin mix
collision energy: fragmentation was performed with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30%
enrichment method: the Preomics ENRICH‐iST kit for mammalian blood plasma and serum was used
instrument: connected online to a Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with EASY‐spray nano‐electrospray ion source
labeling: the samples were tagged using tandem mass tag (TMT) dissolved in anhydrous acetonitrile
